trained_from: START I exact-source PDF/FRUS comparison set
deployment_scope: Universal FRUS source PDFs with compiler-supplied metadata and review gates
source_families: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSR Files
George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSC Meetings Files
George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSC/DC Meetings Files
George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSD Files
George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, Brent Scowcroft Collection, USSR Chronological Files, START Files

observed_pdf_properties.embedded_text: none in sampled Bush Library S3 PDFs; OCR required for that corpus, but universal deployment first checks for embedded text
observed_pdf_properties.file_unit_pattern: one PDF can contain multiple archival documents, withdrawal sheets, access records, distribution sheets, routing sheets, catalog scaffolding, and selected source-document pages
observed_pdf_properties.selected_documents_per_pdf: 1 to 3 in the matched START I set

page_classes.evidence_use: withheld-item, restriction, attachment, and document-boundary evidence

cues: The attached document contains classified National Security Council Information

page_classes.evidence_use: routing, action, seen-by, and signature evidence when legible
distribution evidence only when needed for a source note
candidate body text for FRUS publication

publication_transform: use START I matches to classify page roles, not to infer facts for unrelated PDFs
omit non-document archival scaffolding from body text
move source-family, file-unit, classification, routing, seen-by, and attachment facts into source note or editorial notes only when supported
normalize title, place, date, subject, paragraphing, and list structure
preserve substantive classification markers inside source text
separate original source PDF page boundaries from printed FRUS page breaks
emit human-review warnings for OCR, page-span, source-note, attachment, and declassification decisions

known_multi_document_pdfs.file_unit: NSR-14 - April 03, 1989 - Review of U.S. Arms Control Policies [1]
NSC0021 - June 07, 1989 - Strategic Arms Reduction Talks, Defense Policy, Space Issues
NSC/DC 032 - June 07, 1989 - NSC/DC Meeting on NSR-14 re: U.S. Start Position on Air Breathing Systems and Non-Deployed Missiles
NSD-36 - February 06, 1990 - United States Arms Control Policy
Soviet Power Collapse in Eastern Europe--Strategic Arms Control (May 1990)
NSD-40 - May 14, 1990 - Decisions on START Issues
NSC0058 - June 06, 1991 - Strategic Arms Reduction Talks
